title: Why the state of my FSM does not change?

features.name: enum typed FSM state register with RegInit initialization
features.description: Code should include an FSM implementation using enum type for state values with RegInit initialization to a named enum constant
features.snippet:
typedef enum {sIdle, s5, s10, s15, sOk} state_t;
state_t state = sIdle;

features.name: case-based FSM state transitions with sequential conditionals
features.description: Code should include a case statement for FSM state transitions where each case item contains multiple sequential if statements for mutually exclusive conditions
features.snippet:
case (state)
 sIdle: begin if (nickel) state <= s5; if (dime) state <= s10; end
 s5: begin if (nickel) state <= s10; if (dime) state <= s15; end
 s10: begin if (nickel) state <= s15; if (dime) state <= sOk; end
 s15: begin if (nickel) state <= sOk; if (dime) state <= sOk; end
 sOk: state <= sIdle;
endcase
